stemHtml: A pilot encounters windshear on final approach. What should he/she do to most safely escape it?

options.a: Aggressively apply full thrust using the aircraft performance.
options.b: Engage the autopilot as it flies better than a human.
options.c: Pitch up high, but DO NOT activate the stick shaker.
options.d: Pitch up to a maximum of 10 degrees without activating the stick pusher.
